items.title: Humana Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
items.description: Humana (NYSE:HUM) executives said the company delivered “solid” results in 2025, entered 2026 with strong Medicare Advantage membership momentum, and is prioritizing margin stability and operational execution as it works through a significant Stars-related earnings headwind and an uncertain funding

items.title: Humana Stock Falls on Disappointing Earnings Forecast
items.description: Humana’s shares slipped as nervous investors focused on earnings guidance that came in below Wall Street projections.  Humana, an insurer that focuses on the Medicare business, said it was targeting at least $9 in adjusted earnings per share in 2026.  Humana said its guidance was conservative.

items.title: Humana Earnings Reveal Narrower-Than-Expected Loss. Why the Stock Is Falling.
items.description: Humana shares are down more than 30% since the federal government announced plans last month to keep Medicare Advantage rates nearly flat in 2027.

items.title: Wall Street Lunch: Job Growth Tops Forecast, Delays Fed Cut Expectations
